   - Solve exp(1.96σ) = 2 ⇒ σ ≈ ln(2)/1.96 ≈ 0.35  
   - This gives:  
     • Median (real‐space) = exp(μ) = 50  
     • 95% credible interval ≈ [50·exp(−1.96·0.35), 50·exp(+1.96·0.35)] = [25,100]  
     • Mean (real‐space) = exp(μ + σ²/2) ≈ exp(3.91 + 0.061) ≈ 55  

4. Uncertainty  
   - σ=0.35 reflects moderate uncertainty (spread factor ≈2× above/below median at the 95% level).
